blockers.title: Generated content requires an operator decision

definitionOfDone.item: content_approvals migration applied and verified in production
Genuine social generation creates one pending approval and opens Draft Preview
Current brand-policy violations prevent approval
Operator approve/reject decision persists with notes and timestamp
Production deployment and end-to-end evidence recorded

evidence.description: Unit tests and server-side checks reject current banned phrases before approval, including hashtag-normalized variants.
Supabase SQL verification confirmed public.content_approvals exists with RLS enabled, expected columns and queue index, service_role CRUD grants, and no anon or authenticated SELECT grants.

Production run c2ccbba1-e476-4632-8483-e704d441bef5 generated exactly three Onion Google Business drafts, opened Draft Preview as pending, included no hashtags and image directions, and passed the current banned-phrase check.
Production approval persisted as approved with an operator note and decided_at timestamp; the decision form was removed and the draft remained available as an immutable run preview.
Vercel production deployment for commit 641d081 reached Ready at https://forge-agent-ten.vercel.app before the genuine execution and approval checks.

rollback.strategy: disable approval writes and drop public.content_approvals before any publishing integration depends on it

definitionOfDone.item: getforge.ai owned and added to Vercel project forge-agent
GitHub repo exists at https://github.com/Rahulsanecdote/Forge
Next.js 14 scaffold pushed to main

evidence.description: GitHub API reports Rahulsanecdote/Forge exists with default branch main and pushed commit 3c01a1e.
Vercel project forge-agent linked locally as project prj_bBDfqQepC8A0t6Kf8KC65kl39l4g.
Vercel domains add getforge.ai succeeded, and domains inspect reports getforge.ai found under rahuls-projects-5433a772 with Edge Network enabled.

definitionOfDone.item: 0001_init.sql, 0002_reviews.sql, and 0003_phase00_foundation.sql applied to remote
leads + profiles tables verified present
RLS policies confirmed (anon insert; server-side service-role reads)
auto-profile trigger fires on signup

evidence.description: supabase db push applied 0001_init.sql, 0002_reviews.sql, and 0003_phase00_foundation.sql to project ygygmbocmxhbnvpemsic.
supabase migration list reports Local and Remote versions aligned for 0001, 0002, and 0003.
supabase db lint --linked completed with no schema errors found.

rollback.command: supabase migration repair / drop tables leads, profiles

definitionOfDone.item: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL + ANON_KEY set in Vercel
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY set (server-only)
App fails closed if required secrets missing in prod
No secret present in any NEXT_PUBLIC_ variable

evidence.description: Vercel production env lists NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, FORGE_ADMIN_PASSWORD, FORGE_PROVIDER, FORGE_BASE_URL, FORGE_MODEL, FORGE_API_KEY, and NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL.
npm run env:validate completed successfully locally, and latest GitHub CI run 29129632295 completed successfully with production env-contract validation.

blockers.title: Coming Soon page deployed + email capture working

definitionOfDone.item: Coming Soon page deployed to Vercel
Supabase keys wired into capture form
Test email lands in leads table
getforge.ai points to Vercel with SSL

evidence.description: Vercel production deployment dpl_3Ew7oUNYvjNUF6KWJtDzThoWaHPG is Ready and aliased to https://forge-agent-ten.vercel.app.
curl -I https://forge-agent-ten.vercel.app returned HTTP/2 200 with Vercel TLS headers.
Production POST /api/leads returned 201 for launchops-prod+1783736973379@getforge.ai, and Supabase readback found the row in leads with source launchops-production-e2e.

blockers.title: CI verification gates passing on main

production build passes
secret scan (gitleaks) clean
env validation script passes

evidence.description: GitHub Actions CI run 29129632295 on main completed successfully for commit 3c01a1e.
Local npm run typecheck and npm run build completed successfully on 2026-07-11.
